original_filename: Personal Development Plan PDP - GDC Template.docx

questions.question_text: My registrant title(s) and cycle period: List each title you are registered under, your cycle period and total hours needed.
My work setting(s): What is your place(s) of work and its environment? Different settings may require you to undertake certain roles and skills.

Any additional roles, qualifications or professional interests: Do you have additional roles, qualifications, specialties or areas of focus/interest? Do any of these need continual learning or maintenance?
My patient population: What are the oral health and management needs of patients in your care? Does this change across your work settings?
What do I need to learn or maintain for this cycle? What skills or knowledge have you identified that need developing or maintaining? Are there any gaps that need addressing?
How does this relate to my field of practice? Why have you identified this, how does it relate to your daily job, patients or tasks?
Which development outcome does it link to? (A, B, C or D - see development outcomes table above)
What benefit will this have to my work? How will CPD activity in this area help you to maintain or improve your daily work and/or care for patients?
How will I meet this learning or maintenance need? What activities could you do to help meet your learning and maintenance needs?
When will I complete the activity? What are your target dates for review and completion?

title: Personal Development Plan PDP - GDC Template
